name: Marea
quote: The menu depends on what the nearby ports deliver, and that's exactly the point: fish arrives, kitchen reacts, you win.
article_title: Where To Eat In Rabat Morocco (2026): Best Restaurants, Cafés And Local Favorites

name: Marea
dishes_mentioned: whole grilled catch of the day
quote: Reviewers often highlight crisp frying and careful seasoning, noting portions that feel generous without being heavy.
article_title: Marea Rabat: Fresh, Market-Driven Seafood in the Heart of Hassan

name: Grill Robuchon
quote: The décor keeps it modern and understated: clean lines, warm wood, neutral tones… the kind of room where your lunch somehow turns into a three-course 'why not?'
article_title: Where To Eat In Rabat Morocco (2026): Best Restaurants, Cafés And Local Favorites

name: Le Relais de Paris
quote: Le Relais de Paris is one of those places where you step inside and immediately forget you're in Rabat for a second.
article_title: Where To Eat In Rabat Morocco (2026): Best Restaurants, Cafés And Local Favorites

name: Al Warda
quote: The room glows with zellige shimmer, stylized arabesques, and that softly lit, dressed-up mood that makes you want to order something celebratory.
article_title: Where To Eat In Rabat Morocco (2026): Best Restaurants, Cafés And Local Favorites

name: Mare Nostrum
quote: Mare Nostrum is where you go when the plan is make it a night with colorful, modern décor.
article_title: Where To Eat In Rabat Morocco (2026): Best Restaurants, Cafés And Local Favorites

name: Le Laurier
quote: Le Laurier sits inside the Tour Hassan Palace Hotel, and yes—this is one of those 'we might accidentally stay all afternoon' places.
article_title: Where To Eat In Rabat Morocco (2026): Best Restaurants, Cafés And Local Favorites

name: Riad Dar Chrifa Restaurant
name_variants: Restaurant de l'Hôtel Riad Dar Chrifa
quote: The restaurant at Riad Dar Chrifa lives inside a lovingly restored historic riad—bright courtyards, carved arches, traditional details, and a calm that makes the city noise feel far away.
article_title: Where To Eat In Rabat Morocco (2026): Best Restaurants, Cafés And Local Favorites

name: Golden Fish
quote: Golden Fish is the 'we deserve something nice' option—one of the prettiest dining rooms in Rabat, full stop.
article_title: Where To Eat In Rabat Morocco (2026): Best Restaurants, Cafés And Local Favorites

name: L'Oursin
dishes_mentioned: sea urchin salad with raw shrimp
quote: Out on the Atlantic, it's relaxed and elegant, with an open terrace that's basically designed for long lunches and 'let's just stay for sunset' moments.
article_title: Where To Eat In Rabat Morocco (2026): Best Restaurants, Cafés And Local Favorites

name: Jazz Bar Tour Hassan Palace
quote: When you want your evening to feel a little grown-up (without becoming boring), the Jazz Bar at Tour Hassan Palace is a safe bet.
article_title: Where To Eat In Rabat Morocco (2026): Best Restaurants, Cafés And Local Favorites
